cambrian explosion
& fractals

mental models for what's ahead.

i make sense of things by chasing analogies

  • reason about them. see what fits. see where they break.
  • too far out? yeah. come along.
  • tell me i'm full of shit. that's when we learn.
cosmic farmland

cambrian explosion

~540M years ago. ~20-30M year window.

what happened

  • sudden, rapid changes after billions of years of squishy blobs.
  • environment shifted → variety exploded.
  • most experiments died. survivors → ancestors of everything alive today.

nature got weird

anomalocaris

circular mouth. grabby appendages.

opabinia

five eyes on stalks. claw on a nozzle.

hallucigenia

worm with legs on one side & spiky spines on the other.

these are "body plans." nearly everything failed.

three ideas worth borrowing

unpredictable

combinations

all the bets

unpredictable

we don't know what will win.

surprising successes emerge.

combinations

remix is invention.

little of this, little of that.

all the bets

most fail. most die.

keep making bets.

what this asks of us

don't try to converge too early.
we can't predict, so place many, many bets.

  • environment just shifted. again.
  • most will fail. a few will define the era.

nature's playbook

apply it.

let's get weird.

cosmic farmland

fractals

repeating pattern at different scales.

zoom in, zoom out. same shape.

see it once → recognize it everywhere.

fractal #1: software development

story → feature → epic → initiative → company-wide work

  • same break-it-down, build-it-up shape at every level.
  • sometimes parallel. sometimes sequential. always recursive.

fractal #2: feedback loops

start → implement → validate → gather feedback → iterate

  • pr loop. release loop. retro loop. postmortem loop.
  • same "try, observe, adjust" flow.

fractal #3: people

individual → team → group → org → company

  • widening lens. same dynamics at every scale.
  • impact > busyness at every level.

implication

  • practices that work at one scale likely work at others.
  • failures at one scale give insights into failures at others.
  • see it once. see it everywhere.

cambrian explosion + fractals

let it burn!

most things died.

start anew.

over and over again ;)
